ddls:
CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., acre, BTU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "represents" TEXT /* Representation of the unit in terms of base measurement */,
  "aliases" TEXT /* Aliases for the unit */,
  "si_prefixes" TEXT /* Indicates if the unit is a standard SI prefix */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the unit (e.g., m, kg, s) */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimension of the unit (e.g., length, mass, time) */,
  "base_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base unit that this unit represents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "base_units" (
  "base_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each base unit */,
  "base_unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the base unit (e.g., meter, kilogram, second) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the base unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("base_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_factors" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion factor */,
  "from_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit to convert from */,
  "to_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit to convert to */,
  "factor" REAL /* The factor to multiply by to convert from one unit to the other */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the conversion factor (e.g., 1.0 for exact conversions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_factors_from_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_factors_to_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_units" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Area, Energy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_categories" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the unit belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, standard) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_history" (
  "conversion_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the conversion */,
  "from_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit being converted from */,
  "to_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit being converted to */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date the conversion was performed */,
  "input_value" REAL /* Input value for the conversion */,
  "output_value" REAL /* Output value of the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_history_from_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_history_to_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_units" (
  "custom_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom unit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the custom unit */,
  "custom_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom unit */,
  "custom_representation" TEXT /* Representation of the custom unit in terms of base measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the custom unit */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the custom unit is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("custom_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_units_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_access_logs" (
  "api_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the API */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* The API endpoint that was accessed */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP method used for the request (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "response_status" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_api_keys" (
  "user_api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the API key belongs */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* The API key */,
  "api_key_expiration" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the API key expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_favorites" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the unit as a favorite */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit marked as a favorite */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date the unit was marked as a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_comments" (
  "unit_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit commented on */,
  "comment" TEXT /* The comment or feedback */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_comments_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)
